text.title: Embedding Cost Optimization Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure pulling levers in order of compound savings, with bench gate per lever.

step.name: audit-cost
step.action: Identify dominant cost driver: API calls, storage, retrieval compute.

step.name: enable-dedup
step.action: SHA-256 exact dedup at ingest. Optional near-dup at 0.98 cosine.

step.name: enable-batching-and-cache
step.action: Set batch_size 256–1024. Enable cache if recurrence ≥5%.

step.name: dim-reduce-with-bench
step.action: Bench each on held-out set; pick smallest within recall_tolerance_pp.

step.name: two-stage-if-large
step.action: If corpus >1M vectors OR query cost dominates, enable two-stage retrieval.
